race.description: Thank You Carla Dreyer Mdn Hcp
race.comment: MISSILE AWAY (11) progressed nicely last time out when he made late ground to finish just 1.75 lengths from the winner in second over 1800m at this track. Well placed and there is no reason why he cannot find winning ways. The well-related COOL DRINKS (6) (half to 2xG1 winner Shout The Bar) resumes from a spell of seven months and looked close to a win before that break, finishing off with a minor placing over 2200m at Nowra. Fitter following a trial win at Sunshine Coast Inner Track and must be included in calculations. KOJAK (4) resumed last start and was beaten 3 lengths over 1400m at Eagle Farm. Strips fitter and look for an improved run. BENZINO (3) drew out and pushed forward early but weakened out of it late when fourth over 2200m at this track last time. Can feature back in trip.
